_comment: Verbatim Kaspersky-Lab covered-entity classes from NDAA FY2018 (Pub. L. 115-91) §1634 and its implementing clause FAR 52.204-23(a). These are Public-Law constants (allowed-list constants like NIST control IDs per cloud-evidence/CLAUDE.md REO Rule 3), NOT discretionary catalog data. Generated/refreshed by scripts/extract-prohibited-vendors.mjs.

entities.name_verbatim: Any successor entity to Kaspersky Lab
entities.note: Any successor entity to Kaspersky Lab.

entities.name_verbatim: Any entity that controls, is controlled by, or is under common control with Kaspersky Lab
entities.note: Any entity that controls, is controlled by, or is under common control with Kaspersky Lab.

entities.name_verbatim: Any entity of which Kaspersky Lab has majority ownership
entities.note: Any entity of which Kaspersky Lab has a majority ownership.
